hero.headline: See the big picture.
hero.sub: Whatever vital facility you're monitoring, critical decisions require immediate, confident action. GroundCTRL gives your operators a unified tablet panel to execute layouts, scenarios and commands in a single tap.

pillars.label: Our Foundation
pillars.title: The same principles that power enterprise control rooms.

items.title: Simplicity
items.description: Complex operations reduced to a single tap. No training required — any operator can act immediately on what matters most.

items.title: Scalability
items.description: From a single control room to a global network of monitoring centers. Add rooms, users and integrations without friction.

items.title: Security
items.description: Role-based access control, full audit logs and zero sensitive data stored on device. Your infrastructure stays yours.

problem.label: The Challenge
problem.title: Control rooms are getting more complex.
problem.description: Whatever vital facility or process you are monitoring, making critical decisions has become more complex. Operators juggle separate tools for video walls, cameras, alarms and scenarios — every action requires training and precious seconds.
problem.solution_description: GroundCTRL unifies all controls into a single configurable tablet panel. Tap once to switch a video wall layout, trigger an emergency scenario or show incident cameras.
items: Critical actions take too long under pressure
solution_items: One unified command panel on a tablet
Single tap for any scenario or layout
Full audit log of every action taken

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything your control room needs.
features.subtitle: Purpose-built for professionals who cannot afford to waste time in critical moments.

items.title: Video Wall Control
items.description: Send layouts, presets and commands to Barco video walls via REST API. Switch content in under a second.

items.title: One-Tap Scenarios
items.description: Pre-configured scenarios like Emergency Mode, Default Layout or Incident Map — triggered instantly from the panel.

items.title: Camera Integration
items.description: Connect Milestone, Verkada, Bosch and other VMS platforms. Show the right cameras automatically on any alarm.

items.title: Multi-Connector
items.description: Integrates with Node-RED, Power Automate, Crestron, Q-SYS and Extron for full environment control.

items.title: Tablet-First Design
items.description: Built for iPad and Android tablets. Touch-optimized interface designed for demanding operational environments.

items.title: Instant Deployment
items.description: Deploy via sideload in minutes. No App Store approval. No delays when your client needs it now.

integrations.label: INTEGRATIONS
integrations.title: Connects to your entire control room ecosystem.
integrations.subtitle: GroundCTRL speaks the language of every system already in your control room.

usecases.label: Use Cases
usecases.title: Built for every critical environment.
usecases.subtitle: Wherever operators monitor, protect or control — GroundCTRL fits.

items.title: Security Operations Centers
items.description: Manage video walls, alarms and camera feeds from a single tablet panel.

items.title: Network Operations Centers
items.description: Display dashboards, network maps and alerts on demand with one tap.

items.title: Airports & Ports
items.description: Coordinate operations and security monitoring across large distributed facilities.

items.title: Hospitals
items.description: Control procedure room environments and monitoring displays with precision.

items.title: Energy & Industry
items.description: Manage process monitoring and incident response directly on the operations floor.

items.title: Command & Control Centers
items.description: Execute multi-system scenarios from a single authorized tablet panel.

testimonials.label: // WHAT PROFESSIONALS SAY
testimonials.title: Trusted by the teams running the world's most critical facilities.

demo.label: Final CTA
demo.title: Ready to take command?
demo.subtitle: GroundCTRL gives your team a single command surface for video walls, feeds and response scenarios — live in minutes, ready when the room goes critical.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Enterprise licensing, tailored to your deployment.
pricing.subtitle: GroundCTRL is licensed per installation. Contact us for a proposal.

impact.label: TAKE CONTROL
impact.headline: See the big picture.
impact.sub: Your operators deserve a tool that works as fast as they think. GroundCTRL puts the entire control room in the palm of their hand.

product.label: PRODUCT IN ACTION
product.title: One tap. Total control.
product.sub: From layout switches to emergency scenarios — every action your team needs, organized in a clean tablet interface.
